message: My certificate has the wrong spelling of my name, can you fix it?
My EMI payment failed today, will I get charged a penalty?
notes: single-message, payment failure with a real financial consequence at stake

message: The live class link isn't working, class starts in 5 minutes!!
notes: time-critical session issue, should be urgent

message: I forgot my password and I'm locked out of my account
notes: being locked out is itself blocking, per the priority spec's own definition of high

message: Can someone explain the difference between a stack and a queue?
notes: a direct question needing an answer is 'a normal question' (medium), not purely informational (low)

message: The video keeps buffering and won't load at all, this is really frustrating
notes: blocking technical issue with clear frustration
no signal at all, should stay general/medium rather than guessing

message: Thank you so much for your help!
When will I get my placement assistance details?
notes: placement assistance falls under the certificate/placement category per spec

message: URGENT URGENT my exam is starting right now and I can't log in!!!
notes: explicit repeated urgency plus a real time-critical blocker

message: Just wanted to let you know the last session recording was really helpful
notes: a compliment with no actionable issue -- 'session' is for session issues, this isn't one, so it falls to general

message: I want a refund for the course, it's not what I expected
notes: refund request with dissatisfaction, should be flagged higher than routine

message: My assignment submission is showing an error when I try to upload
notes: an error blocking assignment submission is blocking the student's progress -- high per spec

message: Can you explain recursion with an example?
notes: same reasoning as case 5 -- a direct question is medium, not low

message: I didn't receive the OTP for verification, tried 3 times already
notes: repeated OTP failure blocking the student

conversation.body: Hi! How can we help you today?
The mentor session for today got cancelled without notice, and I had cleared my whole evening for it

notes: multi-turn: opener has no signal, real issue and frustration only appears in the third message

conversation.body: I attended the DSA session yesterday
Just wanted to say thanks, it was really useful

notes: multi-turn conversation that resolves to a thanks/no-action-needed message

conversation.body: When will my next EMI be deducted?

notes: the exact Hi-then-payment scenario this feature was built to fix
